description: This is the main FastAPI application source code for the Asset Health & Maintenance Platform backend. It defines API endpoints for health checks, authentication, managing assets, inspections, alerts, work orders, timelines, dashboard metrics, and serving uploaded files. The file includes route implementations, route dependencies, and documentation metadata.

methods.name: HTTPException _not_found(entity: str)
InspectionPhotoOut _photo_to_out(photo: InspectionPhoto)
datetime _utcnow()

WorkOrderOut change_work_order_status( work_order_id: int, payload: WorkOrderStatusChange, db: Session = Depends(get_db), user: User = Depends(require_roles(UserRole.ADMIN, UserRole.MANAGER, UserRole.TECHNICIAN)), )
AlertOut create_alert( payload: AlertCreate, db: Session = Depends(get_db), user: User = Depends(require_roles(UserRole.ADMIN, UserRole.MANAGER)), )
AssetOut create_asset( payload: AssetCreate, db: Session = Depends(get_db), user: User = Depends(require_roles(UserRole.ADMIN, UserRole.MANAGER)), )
InspectionOut create_inspection( payload: InspectionCreate, db: Session = Depends(get_db), user: User = Depends(require_roles(UserRole.ADMIN, UserRole.MANAGER, UserRole.TECHNICIAN)), )
UserPublic create_user( payload: UserCreate, db: Session = Depends(get_db), _: User = Depends(require_roles(UserRole.ADMIN)), )
WorkOrderOut create_work_order( payload: WorkOrderCreate, db: Session = Depends(get_db), user: User = Depends(require_roles(UserRole.ADMIN, UserRole.MANAGER)), )
Response delete_asset( asset_id: int, db: Session = Depends(get_db), _: User = Depends(require_roles(UserRole.ADMIN)), )
APIMessage docs_auth_help()
AssetOut get_asset( asset_id: int, db: Session = Depends(get_db), _: User = Depends(get_current_user), )
list[TimelineEventOut] get_asset_timeline( asset_id: int, limit: int = Query(50, ge=1, le=200, description="Max items."), db: Session = Depends(get_db), _: User = Depends(get_current_user), )
DashboardOut get_dashboard( db: Session = Depends(get_db), _: User = Depends(get_current_user), )
APIMessage health_check()

list[AlertOut] list_alerts( asset_id: Optional[int] = Query(None, description="Filter by asset id."), is_active: Optional[bool] = Query(True, description="Filter by active state."), limit: int = Query(100, ge=1, le=200, description="Max items."), db: Session = Depends(get_db), _: User = Depends(get_current_user), )

list[AssetOut] list_assets( q: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Search by tag/name/type/location (substring)."), asset_type: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by asset type."), location: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by location."), min_health: Optional[float] = Query(None, ge=0, le=100, description="Minimum health score."), max_health: Optional[float] = Query(None, ge=0, le=100, description="Maximum health score."), db: Session = Depends(get_db), _: User = Depends(get_current_user), )

list[InspectionOut] list_inspections( asset_id: Optional[int] = Query(None, description="Filter by asset id."), limit: int = Query(50, ge=1, le=200, description="Max items."), db: Session = Depends(get_db), _: User = Depends(get_current_user), )

list[WorkOrderOut] list_work_orders( asset_id: Optional[int] = Query(None, description="Filter by asset id."), status_filter: Optional[WorkOrderStatus] = Query(None, description="Filter by status."), assigned_to_user_id: Optional[int] = Query(None, description="Filter by assigned user id."), limit: int = Query(100, ge=1, le=200, description="Max items."), db: Session = Depends(get_db), _: User = Depends(get_current_user), )
TokenResponse login(payload: LoginRequest, db: Session = Depends(get_db))
UserPublic me(current_user: User = Depends(get_current_user))
serve_file( file_key: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db), _: User = Depends(get_current_user), )
AlertOut update_alert( alert_id: int, payload: AlertUpdate, db: Session = Depends(get_db), _: User = Depends(require_roles(UserRole.ADMIN, UserRole.MANAGER)), )
AssetOut update_asset( asset_id: int, payload: AssetUpdate, db: Session = Depends(get_db), _: User = Depends(require_roles(UserRole.ADMIN, UserRole.MANAGER)), )
WorkOrderOut update_work_order( work_order_id: int, payload: WorkOrderUpdate, db: Session = Depends(get_db), _: User = Depends(require_roles(UserRole.ADMIN, UserRole.MANAGER)), )

InspectionPhotoOut upload_inspection_photo( inspection_id: int, file: UploadFile = File(..., description="Image file to upload."), db: Session = Depends(get_db), _: User = Depends(require_roles(UserRole.ADMIN, UserRole.MANAGER, UserRole.TECHNICIAN)), )
